Jackson.note: Jackson County includes Kansas City, MO. Harris won by 19.2 points.

St. Louis County.note_distinction: This is the SUBURBAN county, NOT St. Louis City
St. Louis County.note: St. Louis County (suburban). Largest vote total in MO (502,738). Harris won by 23.4 points.

St. Louis City.note_distinction: Independent city, NOT part of St. Louis County
St. Louis City.note: St. Louis City. Most Democratic jurisdiction in Missouri. Harris won by 64.2 points. Trump got just 16.5%.
